prose.en: Authorize read-only access to audit information to {param:au-09.06_odp}.

parameters.name: au-09.06_odp
parameters.label: subset of privileged users or roles

guidance.en: Restricting privileged user or role authorizations to read-only helps to limit the potential damage to organizations that could be initiated by such users or roles, such as deleting audit records to cover up malicious activity.

prose.en: read-only access to audit information is authorized to {param:au-09.06_odp}.

objects.en: procedures addressing protection of audit information
system configuration settings and associated documentation
system-generated list of privileged users with read-only access to audit information
Organizational personnel with audit and accountability responsibilities
organizational personnel with information security and privacy responsibilities
Mechanisms managing access to audit information

guidelines.en: a subset of privileged users or roles with authorized read-only access to audit information is defined;
